title: Device Home Screen - Quick Settings modal
scenario: Verify that tapping any Quick Setting on the Device Home Screen opens a modal with all related options for changing settings.
steps: 1. Go to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection and configure at least one Quick Setting.
2. Navigate to the Device Home Screen.
3. Tap on the configured Quick Setting.
expected: A modal opens displaying all related options for the tapped Quick Setting, allowing the user to change settings.
